hooks.command: printf 'dynasty-launcher auto-routing active. Consult CLAUDE.md "Auto-routing" section before replying: match user intent to a skill/agent/command and fire it automatically without asking. Key pairings: mod_*/keys/tier questions -> dynasty-provision-ops | browser QA -> gstack /browse + /qa | security audit -> security-reviewer + security-review | ship/deploy -> gstack /ship + /canary | plan review -> /autoplan | off-stack language/domain -> skill-library router. Do not announce skill invocations; just do the work.\n'
